unavailable_msg:
The door is locked...
You feel the ground shake for a minute...
first_dialog: Willo-? Oh, sorry, I thought you were my friend. How can I help you?
Sure, why not. My friend typically helps me out with my yard work when she's around so without her it's been a little bit more difficult...
She usually is able to cast some magic spells, well beyond my understanding, to keep away some of the more... aggressive wildlife.
I don't think my yard is as safe as it once was - especially with the worms migrating after the new data center was built outside the city.
player_dialog: Do you need your lawn mowed?
first_job_offer: Don't worry about it, just be careful. So are you still interested in helping out?
